questions.question:
A Job diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `job-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `job-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetJob` is `report-batch`
- `jobInventory` is `kubectl get job report-batch -n job-lab -o wide`
- `completionsCheck` is `kubectl get job report-batch -n job-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.completions}'`
- `parallelismCheck` is `kubectl get job report-batch -n job-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.parallelism}'`
- `backoffLimitCheck` is `kubectl get job report-batch -n job-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.backoffLimit}'`
- `podEvidenceCheck` is `kubectl get pods -n job-lab -l job-name=report-batch -o wide`
- `jobDescribeCheck` is `kubectl describe job report-batch -n job-lab`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm completions, parallelism, backoffLimit, and pod template command before changing the Job manifest`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/job-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/job-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `Job Inventory`, `Pod Evidence`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not delete the Job, do not create a replacement Job, and do not patch Job status fields during this drill.

verification.description: The Job diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended workload target, inventory commands, parallelism checks, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact Job inventory, pod evidence, and safe manifest review commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe Job remediation guidance is removed
